steps.title: Identify what the phrase must describe
steps.content: ”Multidisciplinary at its core,” characterizes something as fundamentally embracing multiple disciplines. In context, what embodies this multidisciplinary quality? The artist's body of work, not the artist as a person.

steps.title: Apply the principle to the choices
steps.content:
An introductory phrase should be immediately followed by the noun it describes.

Option D places “body of work” as the subject right after the introductory phrase, directly matching what “Multidisciplinary at its core” characterizes.

Options A, B, and C either position the wrong noun immediately after the phrase, delay the correct noun, or introduce a grammatical error.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
